**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Mingfu Automation Technology Co., Ltd. reveals a stark contradiction between its registered 'Shareholding Company' status and its actual operational capacity. Despite a fully paid-in capital of 15 million RMB and an official business scope boasting the 'assembly and production of electronic testing and lead-free soldering equipment (wave/reflow)', the company reported a mere 3 insured employees in 2024. A micro-team of 3 individuals cannot physically manufacture, assemble, or maintain heavy SMT (Surface Mount Technology) soldering lines and automation equipment. Located in the Suzhou Industrial Park, this entity likely functions as an asset-light sales and engineering brokerage, a dormant manufacturing shell that has outsourced its production, or an industrial real estate holding company, explicitly corroborated by the 'own housing rental' clause in its business scope.
